function.content:
---
record_type: invoice
invoice_number: INV-0004
alias: northstar_design_partner_sprint
issued_on: 2026-01-17
total_eur: 890
counterparty: Nordstern Finanzsoftware GmbH
project: Northstar Ledger
related_entity: Nina Schreiber
lines:
  - item: operator workflow discovery sprint
    quantity: 1
    unit_eur: 650
    line_eur: 650
  - item: follow-up timeline prototype review
    quantity: 1
    unit_eur: 240
    line_eur: 240
---
# Northstar design-partner workflow sprint invoice

```text
+----------------+---------------------------------+
| field          | value                           |
+----------------+---------------------------------+
| record_type    | invoice                         |
| invoice_number | INV-0004                        |
| alias          | northstar_design_partner_sprint |
| issued_on      | 2026-01-17                      |
| total_eur      | 890                             |
| counterparty   | Nordstern Finanzsoftware GmbH   |
| project        | Northstar Ledger                |
| related_entity | Nina Schreiber                  |
+----------------+---------------------------------+
```

## Line Items

```text
+---+-------------------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
| # | item                                | qty | unit_eur | line_eur |
+---+-------------------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
| 1 | operator workflow discovery sprint  | 1   | 650      | 650      |
| 2 | follow-up timeline prototype review | 1   | 240      | 240      |
+---+-------------------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
|   | TOTAL                               |     |          | 890      |
+---+-------------------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
```

## Notes

One of the half-product, half-services invoices that keeps testing the boundary between startup work and bespoke delivery.

next_step.current_state: Invoice file updated successfully. Next required cleanup step is removing processed inbox item; inbox file was read earlier so deletion criteria confirmed.
next_step.observation: Write operation to the target invoice path completed without error.

next_step.current_state: Pre-submit verification: Task asked to review next inbound note and act on it. I processed the only inbox item, followed workflow/schema docs, OCR-migrated exactly the explicitly listed invoice file with required invoice frontmatter fields, preserved full original body verbatim below frontmatter, then deleted the inbox item. Completeness: explicit list had 1 file, processed all 1. Numeric check from source lines: 1*650=650 and 1*240=240; 650+240=890 equals total_eur.
next_step.observation: Deleted 00_inbox/000_next-task.md after completing the requested migration task.

function.message: Processed the next inbox item successfully. Added schema-compliant YAML frontmatter to 50_finance/invoices/2026_01_17__eur_000890__inv_0004__northstar_design_partner_sprint.md using visible invoice data, preserved the original note body beneath the frontmatter, and deleted the handled inbox file 00_inbox/000_next-task.md.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed bootstrap order (tree/read AGENTS/context), inspected 99_system before task work, used inbox item as explicit file-list source of truth, applied schema-defined invoice fields only, preserved full original body during frontmatter migration, and deleted inbox item after successful completion per inbox-processing-v2-update.
function.outcome_justification: Evidence from 00_inbox/000_next-task.md explicitly requested OCR/frontmatter migration for one file. Source data in 50_finance/invoices/2026_01_17__eur_000890__inv_0004__northstar_design_partner_sprint.md contained all required fields and line items mandated by 99_system/schemas/finance-record-frontmatter.md, enabling complete safe execution with no guessing.
